title: Why dont we have a video games section
display_title: Why dont we have a video games section
wikitext:
[]: Why don't we have a video games section Post by xPearse » Fri Jun 06, 2014 5:56 am I mean, are people just that uninterested in general at the games. I know they're placed in the everything else evangelion section but I feel it needs it's own, what do you guys think.

[]: Post by Kendrix » Fri Jun 06, 2014 6:06 am I don't think they need their own, really, it's not like we have so much dicussion/material on them. Not even semiofficial things like ANIMA or Sadamoto's manga have their own forums. Also, since most of them weren't released outside of Japan, most ppl wouldn't even know that much about them.

[]: Post by xPearse » Fri Jun 06, 2014 7:25 am Yea that really holds that back, it would just be nice to have it's own section where people could talk about them with those who have played the games.

[]: Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jun 06, 2014 7:36 am EvaGeeks Forum / Completely and Utterly Off-Topic / Video Games and Gaming

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Jun 06, 2014 8:20 am 1) This doesn't belong in Chit-Chat. 2) We don't need an Evangelion Video Games sub-forum. 3) Everything Else Evangelion .
